description: Momentum scalping strategy that detects pushing of Morning High upwards (long) or Morning Low downwards (short)

properties.description: Enable daily maximum profit cap (currency)
Currency amount at/above which no more trades will be taken today
Enable daily maximum loss cap (currency)
Currency amount at/below which no more trades will be taken today
If enabled, close current trade and stop trading for the day when realized + unrealized PnL breaches daily limits
Move stop to breakeven when unrealized profit reaches this dollar amount
Which Day Type + Probe combination satisfies the confluence: (RANGE & FADE), (TREND & CONTINUATION), or either.
Require the Day Type + Probe combo to align (RANGE+FADE or TREND+CONTINUATION).
Enable short entries
Hour to start tracking morning range (0-23)
Minute to start tracking morning range (0-59)
Hour to end tracking morning range (0-23)
Minute to end tracking morning range (0-59)
Initial stop loss distance in ticks (also caps trail looseness)
Profit target in ticks
Trail stop by updating SetStopLoss(CalculationMode.Price) from high/low since entry (not SetTrailStop)
Stop trails this many ticks behind the favorable extreme since entry
Require price to move this many ticks in your favor before trailing begins (0 = immediate)
Default Quantity
Enable long entries
Number of bars after entry to check for quick exit
Only exit if position is in profit when quick exit bars are reached
Enable quick exit after specified number of bars
Only trade when volume meets minimum threshold
Minimum volume required to enter a trade
Enable/disable RSI range filter
Period for RSI calculation
RSI level considered overbought
RSI level considered oversold
Enter reverse positions on RSI extremes
Require price to be above/below EMA for long/short entries
Fast EMA period for momentum filter
Require close > open for longs, close < open for shorts
Skip or require high-impact economic events (NFP, FOMC, CPI, etc.)
Only trade when day has at least this many high-impact events (0 = off). Set to 1+ to only trade news days.
Skip trading when event count >= this value (1 = skip busy news days, 0 = no max).
Minimum AI profit_probability (0-1) required to enter
AI Provider to use
OpenAI model to use
Anthropic model to use
Model name (required for Ollama; overrides enum selection for OpenAI/Anthropic)
Base URL for Ollama server (required if Provider is Ollama)
When enabled, reads API keys from environment variables (FLUXTRADE_OPENAI_API_KEY / FLUXTRADE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
API key for OpenAI (env: FLUXTRADE_OPENAI_API_KEY when Use Environment API Keys is enabled)
API key for Anthropic (env: FLUXTRADE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when Use Environment API Keys is enabled)
Maximum tokens for AI filter completion response
Cache AI filter results to avoid duplicate API calls
Wait this many seconds before making AI filter API call (for cascading multiple accounts)
Gate entries through FluxTrade_ChatGPT_Filter profit_probability score
Start of the pre-market window used by the Day Type classifier (ET).
properties.format: HH:mm or full datetime (ET for session times)

properties.description: Daily ATR period used to scale gap, VWAP, and pre-market range thresholds.
Flag a significant gap when |open - prior close| exceeds this multiple of daily ATR.
Consecutive higher highs / lower lows in pre-market bars required to lean TREND.
Open above this percentile of prior-day range biases TREND UP.
Open below this percentile of prior-day range biases TREND DOWN.
Open farther than this multiple of ATR from VWAP adds a trend point.
Open within this multiple of ATR from VWAP adds a range point.

properties.displayName: DayType PM Range Trend ATR Mult
properties.description: Pre-market range wider than this multiple of ATR adds a trend point.

properties.displayName: DayType PM Range Range ATR Mult
properties.description: Pre-market range tighter than this multiple of ATR adds a range point.
How close to the opening-range high/low (trade window Start..End) counts as a touch.
Use bid/ask delta in the probe score. Requires Tick Replay for historical bars.
Delta (in the push direction) at/above this confirms -> continuation.
If |delta| is below this (or opposes the push), delta is diverging/flat -> fade.
Minutes after the open used to measure the average bar duration baseline.
Touch bar duration <= this x average counts as a fast push -> continuation.
Touch bar duration >= this x average counts as a slow grind -> fade.
Level-side wick-to-body ratio at/above this scores fade.
Level-side wick-to-body ratio at/below this scores continuation.
Lookback (bars) for the average-volume comparison.
0 = off (all enabled confluences must pass). N = at least N enabled confluences must pass.

properties.format: HH:mm or full datetime (ET for session times)

properties.displayName: Enable Slope Trending OR Tall Candle
Enable Slope Trending AND Tall Candle

properties.description: Longs: no bull trap (fake breakout above key level). Shorts: no bear trap (fake breakdown below key level)
Ticks of tolerance when comparing price to key levels
